category_sources: Official GitHub README describes it as a terminal interface for StackOverflow written in Rust.
source_facts.description says terminal interface for StackOverflow.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title is samtay/so and README uses the command name so.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README has a documentation section covering configuration, themes, API keys, search engines, and backends.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/samtay/so; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include rust, cli, terminal, stackoverflow, tui, and stackexchange.
source_facts.description identifies a terminal StackOverflow interface.
